# Git Edge Cases Test
# Tests boundary conditions and special scenarios

# Build the git server binary
go build -o mcp-git-server .

# Create a test git repository with various edge cases
mkdir test_git_repo
cd test_git_repo
git init
git config user.name "Test User"
git config user.email "test@example.com"

# Create initial commit
echo "Initial" > file1.txt
git add file1.txt
git commit -m "Initial commit"

# Create more commits for log testing
echo "Second" > file2.txt
git add file2.txt
git commit -m "Second commit"

echo "Third" > file3.txt
git add file3.txt
git commit -m "Third commit"

# Test edge cases
exec ../mcp-git-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_log","arguments":{"repository":".","max_count":1}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_log","arguments":{"repository":".","max_count":0}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_diff","arguments":{"repository":".","ref1":"HEAD~1","ref2":"HEAD"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_diff","arguments":{"repository":".","ref1":"HEAD~2"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_add","arguments":{"repository":".","files":["."]}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_commit","arguments":{"repository":".","message":"Empty commit with unicode: 🚀 中文"}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_create_branch","arguments":{"repository":".","branch":"unicode-branch-🌟"}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_branches","arguments":{"repository":"."}},"id":11}
EOF

# Verify limited log (max_count=1)
stdout 'Third commit'

# Verify log with max_count=0 (should show all)
stdout 'Initial commit'
stdout 'Second commit'
stdout 'Third commit'

# Verify diff between specific refs
stdout 'file3.txt'

# Verify diff from specific ref to working tree
stdout 'file2.txt'

# Verify adding all files
stdout 'Successfully added files'

# Verify unicode commit message
stdout 'Empty commit with unicode: 🚀 中文'

# Verify clean status after commit
stdout ''

# Verify unicode branch name
stdout 'unicode-branch-🌟'

# Test relative path handling
exec ../mcp-git-server . <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"git_status","arguments":{"repository":"./."}},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify relative path handling
stdout ''

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf test_git_repo
